title: Pierced
description: Custom crossbow mod that adds 2 new crossbows and changes how the piercing enchant works to pierce through a percentage of Armor to increase crossbow usage in pvp/pve.
body:
# **Pierced** – Custom Crossbows
Pierced adds two new crossbows and improves the Piercing enchantment for better armor penetration.

## New Crossbows:
- Sniper Crossbow – Scoped crossbow with enhanced precision and further distances.
- Harpoon Crossbow – Fires a chained harpoon to pull entities towards you or yourself towards where you hit.

##  Piercing Rework:
Now bypasses a percentage of armor per level.

these additions are made so that at longer distances with good aim you can still do good damage to your enemies even if they have maxed netherite and then the harpoon is to go to them or bring them to you to prevent constant running and make it more skill based.

art by drewsbones


[Join Discord](https://discord.gg/W4d4mTUT9c) for future servers with this on and info about future stuff
